title: Savory Light Egyptian Potato Burger
description: A midnight‑craving Egyptian twist on the classic burger, featuring fluffy potato‑based buns, seasoned beef patties, and a zesty tahini sauce.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180°C (350°F) and allow the mashed potatoes to cool slightly.
In a bowl, combine the mashed potatoes, almond flour, beaten egg, and a pinch of salt. Mix until a thick dough forms.
Divide the dough into 4 portions and shape each into a flat patty about 1 cm thick. Set aside.
In a separate bowl, mix the ground beef, crumbled feta, Egyptian spice blend, and a pinch of salt and pepper. Form into 4 slightly larger patties.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Cook the potato patties until golden on each side, about 2–3 minutes per side. Remove and set aside.
In the same skillet, cook the beef patties until browned and cooked through, about 4 minutes per side. Flip gently.
Whisk the tahini, lemon juice, minced garlic, and a splash of water until smooth. Season with salt to taste.
Assemble the burgers: spread sauce on the bottom potato bun, add lettuce, place the beef patty, top with a tomato slice, and cap with the second potato bun. Serve hot.
